name: Zesty Italian Zucchini Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shredded zucchini in a colander and squeeze out any excess water. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Add milk and eggs, mixing well.
3. Stir in parsley, oregano, salt, Parmesan, Romano cheeses, and onion.
4. Fold in the shredded zucchini.
5. Transfer mixture to a greased 1½-quart casserole dish.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
7. Serve hot from a chafing dish. Makes about 5 cups of dip.
8. Suggested Dippers: Italian Bread Chunks, Bell Peppers, Hot Dogs, Genoa Sausage
